title: antistrophe solanoides
intro: Antistrophe solanoides, also known as the moonseed vine or moonseed climber, is a plant species in the family Menispermaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Antistrophe solanoides include treating fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal preparations such as infusions and salves.
